mapper.select: SELECT ua.GROUP_CD, ua.USER_TYPE_CD, d.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, func_find_company(d.DEPT_CD) AS COMPANY FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER ua INNER JOIN TS_DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = ua.USER_ID WHERE ua.GROUP_CD = #{groupCd} AND ua.USER_TYPE_CD <> 'U'

SELECT ua.GROUP_CD, ua.USER_TYPE_CD, u.USER_ID, u.USER_NM, u.USER_DEPT_NM, d.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, func_find_company(d.DEPT_CD) AS COMPANY FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER ua INNER JOIN TC_USER u ON u.USER_ID = ua.USER_ID INNER JOIN TS_DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = u.DEPT_CD WHERE ua.GROUP_CD = #{groupCd} AND ua.USER_TYPE_CD = 'U'
SELECT GROUP_CD FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND GROUP_CD = #{groupCd} AND USER_TYPE_CD = #{userTypeCd}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER ( USER_ID, GROUP_CD, USER_TYPE_CD, REG_ID, MOD_ID, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.groupCd}, #{item.userTypeCd}, #{item.regId}, #{item.modId}, NOW(), NOW())
